purpose: A control for selecting and uploading files. Combines a Browse button with file name display, supports drag-and-drop, mime-type filter, max-size limit.
whenToUse: Single or multi-file upload in forms
whenNotToUse: For large datasets — use server-side upload tools
doRules: Show file size limit before upload
Display selected file name with remove affordance
dontRules: Do not omit file size limit
Do not silently fail on rejected file types
Do not omit progress feedback for large files

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Enter activates browse; file dialog uses native OS controls
Pair with Label describing what to upload
Upload progress announced; success/error states announced

exceptions: multiple=true allows file picker to select multiple files
